title: Malefice: A True Story of a Demonic Haunting
original_title: Malefice: A True Story of a Demonic Haunting
overview: Wanting revenge after Sean Austin crossed over two trapped souls from a dark location, an evil presence tried to seek retaliation against him for 5 years. Coming to this realization, Sean knew he had to return with friend and fellow investigators Dave Spinks and Eric Conner with the hope of finally finishing what he started and sending it back to where it belongs...HELL.
